title: Certificate of Incorporation Form
text:
Certificate of Incorporation Form 

prescribed under clause 51(1)(c) of the

Agricultural Marshland Conservation Act 

S.N.S. 2000, c. 22

N.S. Reg. 124/2003 (June 20, 2003) 






Certificate of Incorporation 

(Section 11, Agricultural Marshland Conservation Act ) 


The provisions of the Agricultural Marshland Conservation Act having been complied with, owners of marshland within the marshland section(s), or portion thereof, described below and located in the County/Counties of ___________________________, in the Province of Nova Scotia, constitute a marsh body under the name of the ____________________ Marsh Body, effective on and after ______________________.

Description of marshland section(s), or portion of marshland section (specify):








The members of the provisional executive committee of the _____________________ Marsh Body are



__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 

__________________________________ of __________________________________ 


______________________________


Minister of Agriculture and Fisheries 




Halifax, Nova Scotia

Dated _____________________

[Note: Effective February 24, 2006, the reference to the Minister of Agriculture and Fisheries should be read as a reference to the Minister of Agriculture in accordance with Order in Council 2006-121 under the Public Service Act , R.S.N.S. 1989, c. 376.]
